sb_prompt: DOES YOUR FAMILY KEEP A MONTHLY BUDGETCAN YOU GIVE A GENERAL DESCRIPTION OF YOUR PROCEDURES
raw_output:
ParticipantA: Hi, I'm calling about the family finance topic. Can you tell me about your family's budgeting process?

ParticipantB: Sure, we try to keep track of our expenses and income each month. We make a list of all our bills and set aside money for savings and fun activities.

ParticipantA: That sounds great. I don't think my family has ever really sat down to make a budget. We just kind of wing it each month.

ParticipantB: Oh, that can be tricky. Have you ever considered making a budget to help you manage your money better?

ParticipantA: Yeah, I've thought about it before. But it always seems like too much work.

ParticipantB: Well, it can be time-consuming at first, but it really helps you stay on track and avoid overspending.

ParticipantA: Maybe I'll give it a try. Do you have any tips for getting started?

ParticipantB: Sure, start by listing all your income sources and then make a list of all your expenses, including bills and any extra spending.

ParticipantA: That makes sense. Thanks for the advice!

ParticipantB: No problem. Good luck with your budgeting!

ParticipantA: Thanks, you too!
